title: Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a Data Scientist with strong Python and SQL skills. Experience with machine learning, scikit-learn, and data visualization (Plotly/Matplotlib) required. Nice to have: AWS, Docker.

title: Data Analyst
description: Responsibilities include data analysis using Excel and SQL, building dashboards in Power BI, and presenting insights. Python and pandas are a plus. Familiarity with Git is preferred.

title: ML Engineer
description: Build and deploy ML pipelines. Required: Python, machine learning, deep learning (PyTorch/TensorFlow), Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud (AWS or GCP). Bonus: Spark, Linux.
